preregistration: issue #193 comments (2026-07-16 pre-registration + CEK addendum); owner spend approval recorded on the issue 2026-07-17. This file mirrors the run contract; the issue text is the pre-registration of record.
hypothesis: Loading a third-party planning skill (writing-plans, obra/superpowers; sdd/plan-task, NeoLab CEK) changes graded implementation-plan quality on planning tasks versus a bare arm. Direction unstated; KEEP/CUT per the shared benchstats.keep_verdict rule (ADR 0025). A null is an equally valid recorded outcome. Secondary question (the point of the run): does skill-bench produce a judge-robust, interpretable verdict on skills authored outside house conventions.
gate_or_optimization: gate (ADR 0062/0065): cheap go/no-go on the instrument's out-of-distribution validity, not a powered optimization.

arms.bare: hermetic claude -p, fixture workdir, no skill content
arms.wp: bare + --append-system-prompt = treatments/writing-plans.SKILL.md body (frontmatter stripped; 7,092 bytes fetched, provenance.json)
arms.cek: bare + --append-system-prompt = treatments/plan-task.SKILL.md body (frontmatter stripped; 46,099 bytes fetched, provenance.json)

arm_symmetry: identical task prompt, model, tool carve-out (Read, Grep, Glob, Write, Edit; Task/Agent/Bash stay denied), timeout, workdir bundle, and artifact-capture rule across all arms; arms differ ONLY in the injected skill body. Bare cells are generated ONCE and reused for both paired comparisons (pre-registered protocol fact, issue addendum). Labeled caveat: both skills orchestrate files/subagents their body cannot execute under the hermetic arm — this measures body-as-guidance (L2), the pre-registered infrastructure-asymmetry limitation.
graded_artifact_rule: per cell: the concatenation of every new *.md file the cell created in its workdir (capture_artifacts — expected: PLAN.md); if none, the response text. Same rule every arm; a cell whose graded artifact fails lib/artifact_check (min 400 chars) is an ERROR cell, never quality 0 (#191).

prescreen.rule: 1 bare rep per eval BEFORE any treatment cell (ADR 0065). An eval whose bare fraction-met >= 0.85 is saturated: harden or drop, recorded here before the grid. A 0.0 floor is flagged (not auto-dropped). Fewer than 2 discriminating evals after the screen: STOP, record, switch to the pre-registered alternate candidate with fresh evals — never difficulty-tune toward a verdict (ADR 0024).
prescreen.result: run 2026-07-17 (prescreen-outputs/, graded/prescreen-grok.jsonl): bare frac_met = 0.83 on ALL FOUR evals — under the 0.85 ceiling, no eval dropped or hardened, no stop. Observation recorded pre-grid: the bare miss is uniformly expectation 2 (per-step verification) with expectations 1/3/4/5/6 met 4/4 at n=1 — discriminating power concentrates on exp 2 plus rep variance; headroom exists in both directions. Proceeding per the pre-registered letter; hardening beyond the trigger would be difficulty-tuning (ADR 0024).

pilot.rule: cost pilot on the treatment arms (wp x2 + cek x1 cells on E1) before the grid; if the projected full-grid cost exceeds 2x the pre-registered estimate (notional $6-12), STOP for re-approval (ADR 0066).
pilot.result: run 2026-07-17 (pilot-outputs/): wp $0.415-0.55, cek $0.453, bare $0.31 (prescreen mean). Projection: 36 x mean($0.417) = $15.0 grid; + $2.67 prescreen/pilot + ~$0.78 operator error (a duplicate pilot process launched and was stopped after re-running two wp cells; recorded as waste, cells overwritten harmlessly) + judge ~$1-3 real (claude divergence pass; grok is notional) = ~$19-21 total. This exceeds the $12 ceiling first encoded here but is UNDER the pre-registered >2x stop (issue rule of record: stop only above $24). ceiling_usd updated 12 -> 20 pre-grid with this justification; the >2x stop stands.

judging: grok (cross-family) is the headline judge; claude grades the same cells as the divergence diagnostic (agreement, verdict flip). A judge flip on either pair's verdict: exploratory label, re-measure signal, no KEEP/CUT promotion (pre-registered kill condition).
metrics: headline: per-pair (wp-bare, cek-bare) eval-clustered fraction-met delta + 95% CI (benchstats.clustered_delta, ADR 0019/0025); secondary: binary all-met and per-arm consistency (within-eval rep spread + worst-rep score, ADR 0065), pre-registered alongside means.

cost.estimate_note: pre-registered notional estimate: ~42-43 generation cells (~$4-8 primary + CEK addendum) + ~2x42 judge calls (grok subscription-billed notional $1-2; claude divergence pass). Hard stop for re-approval if the pilot projects >2x.

sample_rule.rule: every cell's full record (response + envelope summary + captured artifacts) is committed under outputs/ (prescreen-outputs/, pilot-outputs/, outputs/); population appended post-run
